title: InköpsListan
description: A web application for creating, importing, and managing recipes and shopping lists from URLs – with AI-powered ingredient analysis, categorization, and a smooth shopping experience.
backstory: InköpsListan is an innovative web application that simplifies grocery shopping with AI support. The app can analyze recipes, automatically categorize ingredients, and generate optimized shopping lists. Built with React and Firebase, the project demonstrates modern AI integration in practical everyday applications.
